challenges.name: All operators must be the same race
All operators must be the same faction
Only operators featured in this event story
Operators with names starting with the same letter
Only operators released in the same year
Operators that share the same type of base skill
All operators must use the same type of weapon (e.g. sword, crossbow)
Operators in swimsuits/Coral Coast outfits only
Operators that inflict status effects only
Operators with deployables/summons only
challenges.detail: E.g. trapmasters, summoners, artificers, tacticians, Kally Wally, etc.

challenges.name: No blocking allowed
challenges.detail: Block count 0, no cheating by buffing block count

challenges.name: Deploy on one side of the map only
Operators with alters and their alters only
1* ops only, plus one wild card of any rarity
Your least popular/most niche operators only
Backwardknights
challenges.detail: Only operators who can target behind themselves, exclusively facing away

challenges.name: Frailknights
challenges.detail: Greater than 1.5k hp need not apply

challenges.name: Defeat all enemies within one tile of the blue box
All operators with the same eye color
All operators with the same hair color
All operators with the same color scheme
ABCknights
challenges.detail: All operator names must use consecutive letters, doesn't have to begin at A

challenges.name: All operators must be deployed adjacent to one another
Only operators born within the same month
Operators must not retreat or be defeated
Non-boss enemies can't move farther than 5 tiles from a red box
challenges.detail: Unless they spawn farther away of course

challenges.name: No healing or regen
challenges.detail: That includes self-sustain, e.g. Mountain, Thorns, reapers

challenges.name: Convictionknights
challenges.detail: Conviction must be deployed first, have s2 equipped, operators can only be deployed in s2 range, and Conviction must not be defeated. Don't worry, I had to look the skill up too.

challenges.name: Offensive/defensive recovery skills only
challenges.detail: Dusting off your Ch'en and Blemi is explicitly allowed, if not encouraged.

challenges.name: Only one DPS + a bunch of buffers
